CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `bed_assignment_history` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `ipd_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `bed_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `assignment_type` enum('admission','transfer','discharge') CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,

bed_master.create_sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `bed_master` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `bed_code` varchar(20) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `bed_number` varchar(20) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `ward_id` int NOT NULL,
  `bed_category_id` int NOT NULL,
  `bed_status` enum('available','occupied','reserved','blocked','under_maintenance','cleaning') CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT 'available',
  `bed_position` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `has_oxygen` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `has_suction` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `has_monitor` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `has_ventilator` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `is_isolation_bed` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `current_ipd_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `occupied_since` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `last_cleaned_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `remarks` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `base_charge_override` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Override base charge per day (NULL = use category default)',
  `nursing_charge_override` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Override nursing charge per day (NULL = use category default)',
  `status` enum('active','inactive') CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT 'active',
  `created_at` datetime DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `last_occupied_date` datetime DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Last time bed was occupied',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `bed_code` (`bed_code`),
  UNIQUE KEY `unique_ward_bed` (`ward_id`,`bed_number`),
  KEY `idx_ward` (`ward_id`),
  KEY `idx_category` (`bed_category_id`),
  KEY `idx_bed_status` (`bed_status`),
  KEY `idx_current_patient` (`current_ipd_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=68 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

base_charge_override.Comment: Override base charge per day (NULL = use category default)

nursing_charge_override.Comment: Override nursing charge per day (NULL = use category default)
